channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The man behind the legendary MPC, Roger Linn, stays focused with a single browser tab
item.description: Roger Linn is a legend in the world of musical instruments. He's been at the cutting edge of music technology for decades. He created the LM-1, the first drum machine to use samples, and its successor, the LinnDrum, is one of the most iconic drum machines of all time. They were used on countless records […]

item.title: How to watch Bayern Munich vs Stuttgart: Live Streams, TV Schedule and Preview for DFB-Pokal final
item.description: Here's how to watch Bayern Munich vs Stuttgart live streams online and from anywhere, as the two clubs meet in the DFB-Pokal final in Berlin.

item.title: Dead by Daylight is finally adding Jason from Friday the 13th
item.description: At long last, Jason is coming to Dead By Daylight.

item.title: People used AI to recreate the voices of pilots killed in a plane crash
item.description: People took a PDF file report about a plane crash and used AI to recreate the last few seconds its pilots' conversation.

item.title: Nuclear startup Deep Fission says it’s going public, again, and I have questions
item.description: Deep Fission is seeking an IPO that could raise $157 million, though investors may have trouble buying the nuclear startup's story.

item.title: Snap up the powerful and four-star-rated Dell 16 Plus laptop for under $900
item.description: The Dell 16 Plus has crashed in price down to $899.99 on the Dell website

item.title: « C’était une énorme surprise » : James-Webb observe des nuages qui se forment puis disparaissent sur une planète lointaine
item.description: WASP-94A b est une géante gazeuse portée parfois à 1 000 °C et que l'on peut observer dans la constellation du Microscope, constellation créée par l'astronome français Nicolas-Louis de Lacaille en 1752, afin de compléter les derniers pans de ciel austral sans dénomination. Le télescope spatial...

item.title: I've looked through all of today's Memorial Day appliance sales, these are the best by far — save up to $1,700 on refrigerators, coffee machines, air fryers, Ninja Slushi
item.description: We've rounded up all of the biggest Memorial Day discounts on appliances into one easy-to-read list right here.

item.title: Here are 38 Memorial Day deals we recommend for $50 or less
item.description: Massive OLED TVs and Sonos speakers might be stealing the Memorial Day spotlight, but there are also plenty of great deals that won't set you back nearly as much. In fact, some of the best discounts we're seeing are on gadgets that retail for $50 or less, from portable chargers and 4K streaming devices to […]

item.title: How to watch Oleksandr Usyk vs Rico Verhoeven: live stream boxing online, start time, ringwalks, fight card, PPV cost
item.description: All the ways to watch Usyk vs Verhoeven live streams online, including PPV options as the Ukrainian defends his WBC world heavyweight title in Egypt.

item.title: Gigabyte lance un écran PC Gaming Oled à 400 euros avec un avantage décisif
item.description: Les marques de PC se lancent dans une guerre des prix sur le marché des moniteurs gaming. Gigabyte répond à Alienware avec un écran WOled à 400 euros et pleinement HDR.

item.title: Memorial Day Dyson Vacuum Deals: V15 Detect, Gen5Detect, PencilVac On Sale
item.description: Wishing for your very own Dyson vacuum? Don’t miss these vacuum deals happening over the holiday weekend.

item.title: Cette liseuse Vivlio fait de l’ombre à la Kindle avec une promo qui tombe à pic pour la fête des mères
item.description: Si vous cherchez un cadeau pour la Fête des mères, la Vivlio Light Zen est en promo à 89 euros au lieu de 109 euros sur E.Leclerc.

item.title: How to watch Barcelona vs Lyon: Live Streams, TV Schedule and Preview for Women’s Champions League final
item.description: All the ways to watch Barcelona vs Lyon live streams online – including for FREE – in the Women's Champions League final at Ullevaal Stadion in Oslo.
